title: Evidence Repository Storage and Git History Strategy
decision: Keep current-state evidence inline in Git; enforce thresholds; no LFS and no history rewrite now.
limitations: Exact duplicate accepted-run ZIPs remain in case-local and accepted-run indexes.
No real remote asset retrieval was executed because no current artifact is assigned external storage.
Historical Git-object size cannot be measured from a ZIP publication package without the repository .git directory.
